home.title: BZNS — Micro-Business Launchpad
home.subtitle: Your AI-powered guide to launching a micro-business in Quebec.

intake.title: Business Profile
intake.subtitle: Tell us about your business idea to get a personalised roadmap.

roadmap.title: Legal Roadmap
roadmap.subtitle: Personalized, dependency-ordered steps to launch your business in Québec legally.
roadmap.empty: Complete your business profile to generate a personalised roadmap.
roadmap.staleWarning: Your settings changed since this roadmap was generated.
roadmap.reviewBanner: We reviewed your roadmap for your specific business
roadmap.reviewDetail: need your attention before moving forward — tap the highlighted steps to see what to confirm.

funding.title: Funding Matches
funding.subtitle: Québec programs you qualify for
funding.empty: Complete your business profile to see funding matches.

assistant.greeting: Hey! How can I help you today?
assistant.title: BZNS Assistant
assistant.emptyState: Ask me anything about your business in Quebec.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your profile and business information.
settings.roadmapNotice: After saving changes to your business type or location, go to your dashboard and click {bold} to get updated steps.
settings.emailHint: Your login email — managed through magic link authentication.
settings.businessTypeHint: Used to select the right legal steps and funding programs for your roadmap.
settings.businessNameHint: Leave blank if you haven't chosen a name yet.
settings.businessDescriptionHint: A short summary of what you do. Used to personalize your roadmap.
settings.boroughHint: Montréal borough, if applicable (e.g. Villeray, Plateau-Mont-Royal).
settings.expectedRevenueHint: Used to calculate your tax snapshot and GST/QST registration threshold.

dashboard.completeIntakeSubtitle: Complete your business profile to unlock your personalized roadmap, funding matches, and financial snapshot.
dashboard.staleWarning: Your settings changed since this roadmap was generated.

common.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
